display.purpose: Post titles and page heroes. One per page, maximum.

headline.purpose: Major section openers on home and projects.

title.purpose: Story card titles and article h2.

eyebrow.purpose: Short kicker above a headline. Sparingly, never repeated section grammar.

body.purpose: All interface copy at lh 1.47. Article prose raises lh to 1.65.

label.purpose: Uppercase category labels on story cards, nothing else.

code.purpose: Code blocks and inline code, on the system mono stack.

shadows.name: story-rest
shadows.purpose: Resting shadow on Newsroom-style story cards over Canvas Tint. The only component shadowed at rest.

shadows.name: story-hover
shadows.purpose: Story card hover, paired with a 2px rise, 300ms house curve.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: focus-visible ring on every interactive element.

motion.name: ease-house
motion.purpose: The One Curve Rule. Every transition on the site.

motion.name: ease-curtain
motion.purpose: Sanctioned exception, mobile nav flyout curtain only.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Color and state changes, card hovers.

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-entry reveal, opacity 0 to 1 plus 16px rise, plays once.

motion.name: reveal-stagger
motion.purpose: Apple Newsroom cascade levels for grouped reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Apple pill CTA. Blue fill, white text, no transform on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0071e3; color: #ffffff; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.17; letter-spacing: -0.022em; font-weight: 400; padding: 12px 22px; border: none; border-radius: 980px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.25, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0076df; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #006edb; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0, 113, 227, 0.5); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet gray pill for secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #e8e8ed; color: #1d1d1f; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.17; letter-spacing: -0.022em; font-weight: 400; padding: 12px 22px; border: none; border-radius: 980px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.25, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #dededf; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { background: #d2d2d7; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0, 113, 227, 0.5); }

components.name: CTA Text Link
components.description: Apple learn-more link. Blue text, static chevron, hover underlines text only.
components.css: .ds-link-cta { color: #0066cc; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; letter-spacing: -0.022em; text-decoration: none; } .ds-link-cta:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-link-cta:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0, 113, 227, 0.5); border-radius: 4px; } .ds-link-cta-chevron { text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; margin-left: 2px; }

components.name: Global Nav
components.description: 44px frosted bar, transparent at top of page, scrim after scroll. Quiet 12px links.
components.html:
ege
blogprojectsaboutmusicbooks
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 44px; padding: 0 22px; background: rgba(250, 250, 252, 0.8); backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); border-bottom: 1px solid #d2d2d7; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-wordmark { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; color: #1d1d1f; letter-spacing: -0.022em; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 24px; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: rgba(29, 29, 31, 0.8); text-decoration: none; transition: color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.25, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #1d1d1f; } .ds-nav-link-active { color: #1d1d1f; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0, 113, 227, 0.5); border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Story Card
components.description: Apple Newsroom tile. Image leads, label, title, summary, date. Whole card is the link.
components.html:
FOLIO

meeting recorder for macOS, local-first transcription

whisper.cpp, diarization, and zero cloud round trips.

June 9, 2026
components.css: .ds-story { display: block; max-width: 420px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 18px; overflow: hidden; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 2px 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); transition: box-shadow 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.25, 1), transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.25, 1); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-story:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 2px 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16); } .ds-story:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0, 113, 227, 0.5); } .ds-story-media { height: 180px; background: #e8e8ed; } .ds-story-well { padding: 24px; } .ds-story-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #86868b; } .ds-story-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.14; letter-spacing: 0.007em; color: #1d1d1f; margin: 8px 0 8px; } .ds-story-summary { font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.47; letter-spacing: -0.022em; color: #6e6e73; margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-story-date { font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #86868b; }

components.name: Post List Row
components.description: Sparse archive row. Title left, date right, siblings dim on hover.
components.html: ears without eyesMay 2026i cloned my advisory boardApr 2026the next sessionsMar 2026
components.css: .ds-postlist { max-width: 560px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-postlist:hover .ds-postrow { opacity: 0.5; } .ds-postlist:hover .ds-postrow:hover { opacity: 1; } .ds-postrow { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; gap: 24px; padding: 16px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #d2d2d7; text-decoration: none; transition: opacity 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.25, 1); } .ds-postrow:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0, 113, 227, 0.5); border-radius: 4px; } .ds-postrow-title { font-size: 17px; letter-spacing: -0.022em; color: #1d1d1f; } .ds-postrow-date { font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #86868b; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Segmented Filter
components.description: Apple 'Explore the lineup' control. One gray pill container, monochrome ink inversion when selected, never blue.
components.css: .ds-seg { display: inline-flex; gap: 2px; background: #e8e8ed; border-radius: 980px; padding: 4px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-seg-opt { background: transparent; color: #1d1d1f; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: -0.016em; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 980px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.25, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.25, 1); } .ds-seg-opt:hover { color: #000000; } .ds-seg-opt:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0, 113, 227, 0.5); } .ds-seg-opt-selected { background: #1d1d1f; color: #ffffff; } .ds-seg-opt-selected:hover { color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Hairline-bordered field, blue focus ring, no border morph.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #ffffff; color: #1d1d1f; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; letter-spacing: -0.022em; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid #d2d2d7; border-radius: 12px; width: 280px; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #86868b; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0, 113, 227, 0.5); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Apple Style Guide 'Helpful? Yes, No' pair. Paired low-emphasis choices only.
components.css: .ds-outline-pair { display: flex; gap: 12px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #0066cc; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: -0.016em; padding: 8px 24px; border: 1px solid #0066cc; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.25, 1), color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.25, 1), border-color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.25, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #0076df; border-color: #0076df; color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0, 113, 227, 0.5); }

components.name: Theme Switcher
components.description: developer.apple.com footer segmented pill. Light, Dark, Auto. Selected segment fills Action Blue.
components.css: .ds-theme { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; border: 1px solid #d2d2d7; border-radius: 980px; padding: 2px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-theme-opt { background: transparent; border: none; color: #6e6e73; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 980px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.25, 1), background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.25, 1); } .ds-theme-opt:hover { color: #1d1d1f; } .ds-theme-opt:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0, 113, 227, 0.5); } .ds-theme-opt-selected { background: #0071e3; color: #ffffff; } .ds-theme-opt-selected:hover { color: #ffffff; }

narrative.overview: A keynote slide does one thing. One idea, enormous clarity, generous emptiness around it, and a presenter who never raises their voice. This system rebuilds chele.bi the way Apple builds apple.com and Apple Newsroom: white or true black canvases, one type family, blue reserved for things you can touch, motion that states a fact and stops. Every token was extracted from Apple's production CSS in June 2026. This system explicitly rejects what the current site became: crowded, too much information collapsing into each other. It retires the retro 8-bit language and gamified self-presentation on every new surface. The blog reads like Newsroom. The projects page presents like a product page.
keyCharacteristics: Apple-faithful tokens, taken verbatim from apple.com, not approximated.
Readability is the metric. Article measure capped at 68ch, body 17px.
Flat at rest. Depth comes from alternating canvases, not borders or shadows.
One easing curve, four durations. Scroll reveals play once and never repeat.
Blue means interactive, everywhere, with zero decorative exceptions.
Shared primitives first. Pages compose Nav, Tile, StoryCard, Prose, Chip, Gallery.

rules.name: The One Curve Rule
rules.body: Every transition uses cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.25, 1). The single sanctioned exception is the nav flyout curtain at cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1). No springs, no bounce, no elastic on new surfaces.

rules.name: The Four Durations Rule
rules.body: 100ms instant feedback, 240ms nav and scrim, 300 to 400ms state and color, 800ms scroll reveals. Nothing else.

rules.name: The Play Once Rule
rules.body: Scroll reveals are a single fade plus 16px rise, 800ms, staggered 0s / 0.05s / 0.2s / 0.4s, once per page load. Render the final state immediately under prefers-reduced-motion.

rules.name: The Silence Rule
rules.body: Keyboard-triggered actions, theme switching and pagination are instant.

rules.name: The Blue Is Interactive Rule
rules.body: Blue appears only on elements that respond to a click or tap. If something blue does nothing when clicked, that is a bug.

rules.name: The Two Canvases Rule
rules.body: Light-mode depth is alternating #ffffff and #f5f5f7 sections. If a section boundary is unclear, switch the canvas, do not draw a line.

rules.name: The True Black Rule
rules.body: Dark mode's page canvas is #000000. Surfaces climb #161617, #1d1d1f, #333336 strictly in elevation order.

rules.name: The No New Colors Rule
rules.body: The system never adds a hue beyond blue and the grays. Project logos and photography are the only saturation on any page.

rules.name: The Semibold Ceiling Rule
rules.body: No weight above 600, ever. Emphasis beyond semibold comes from size.

rules.name: The 68ch Rule
rules.body: Article prose never exceeds the 692px column.

rules.name: The Optical Tracking Rule
rules.body: Tracking follows SF Pro's optical curve, -0.022em at 17px tightening toward zero as sizes grow. Never uniform across sizes.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: The system stack everywhere, the system mono only inside code. A third family is prohibited.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadow is a response to hover, blur is a response to scroll.

rules.name: The Two Blurs Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter exists in exactly two places, the global nav scrim and the dialog backdrop. Glass cards and decorative frosted panels are prohibited.

rules.name: The 44 Point Rule
rules.body: Every interactive element presents a hit area of at least 44px by 44px. Visually smaller controls gain it through padding, never through visual size.

dos: Do take values from this file literally. #0071e3 means #0071e3, 17px means 17px, 600 means 600.
Do alternate #ffffff and #f5f5f7 to separate sections, and #000000, #161617, #1d1d1f in dark mode, in ladder order.
Do cap article prose at the 692px column and interface rows at the 980px shell.
Do use cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.25, 1) with the four durations for every transition, playing scroll reveals once.
Do keep blog posts as the MDX files they are today. The redesign touches mdx-components.tsx, never the posts.
Do compose new pages from Story Card, Post List Row, Project Tile, Chip, Gallery and the prose surface before inventing anything.
Do render the final state immediately under prefers-reduced-motion.
Do give every interactive element a 44px by 44px hit area, padding visually smaller controls up to it.
donts: Don't recreate 'too crowded, too much information collapsing into each other.' One idea per fold.
Don't carry the 8-bit language onto new surfaces: no dashed borders, pixel fonts, kanji marquee, glitch, scramble, shimmer or scanlines.
Don't use skill bars, lvl badges, quests or guild logs.
Don't put blue on anything that is not interactive, and don't use any accent hue beyond the blue ramp.
Don't use weights above 600, a third font family, or uniform letter-spacing across sizes.
Don't use gradient text, bento grids, glassmorphism beyond the nav scrim and dialog backdrop, colored side stripes, or hover scales above 1.015.
Don't substitute gray-900 dark backgrounds for true black.
Don't add springs, bounce, parallax, scroll-scrubbing or re-triggering reveals.
Don't let the nav change height or gain layout-shifting borders on scroll.
Don't ship a modal where an inline treatment works.
